name: augent
description: The audio & video layer for agents. 22 local MCP tools. No cloud, no API keys.
author: AugentDevs

commands.name: download_audio
commands.description: Download audio from video URLs (1000+ sites)

commands.name: transcribe_audio
commands.description: Transcribe audio with timestamps in 99 languages

commands.name: search_audio
commands.description: Keyword search with timestamps and context

commands.name: deep_search
commands.description: Semantic search by meaning

commands.name: search_memory
commands.description: Search across all stored transcriptions

commands.name: take_notes
commands.description: Download, transcribe, and save formatted notes

commands.name: clip_export
commands.description: Export a video clip for a time range

commands.name: chapters
commands.description: Auto-detect topic chapters with timestamps

commands.name: search_proximity
commands.description: Find where two keywords appear near each other

commands.name: identify_speakers
commands.description: Speaker diarization — who said what and when

commands.name: separate_audio
commands.description: Isolate vocals from music and noise

commands.name: batch_search
commands.description: Search multiple audio files in parallel

commands.name: text_to_speech
commands.description: Convert text to speech with 54 local voices

commands.name: list_files
commands.description: List media files in a directory

commands.name: list_memories
commands.description: Browse all stored transcriptions

commands.name: memory_stats
commands.description: View transcription memory statistics

commands.name: clear_memory
commands.description: Clear stored transcriptions

commands.name: tag
commands.description: Add, remove, or list tags on transcriptions

commands.name: highlights
commands.description: Export best moments or topic-matched clips

commands.name: visual
commands.description: Extract frames from video at key moments

commands.name: rebuild_graph
commands.description: Rebuild Obsidian knowledge graph

commands.name: spaces
commands.description: Download or live-record X/Twitter Spaces

AUGENT_AUTH_TOKEN.description: Optional. Path to Twitter/X auth token file for Spaces recording. Default ~/.augent/auth.json

AUGENT_DOWNLOAD_DIR.description: Directory for downloaded audio files. Default ~/Downloads/

AUGENT_NOTES_DIR.description: Directory for notes, clips, and TTS output. Default ~/Desktop/

AUGENT_MEMORY_DIR.description: Directory for persistent transcription memory. Default ~/.augent/memory/
